prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1b59e163`.
codex_response:
The rule is: identify each multi-cell diagonal-connected motif, find its uniquely rare anchor color, then restamp that whole motif at every isolated singleton of the same color; all singleton distractors, including gray `5`, disappear. I used the Opus hint as the starting point and discarded the Sonnet hint because it incorrectly treats gray `5` cells as the drivers of the transformation; that mismatch is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1b59e163/notes.md).

The generator matches the task family by building small anchored motifs, placing one source instance plus matching singleton anchor markers, and adding sparse gray noise. It also allows the body color to vary instead of hard-coding `1`, which keeps it consistent with the broader task pattern. No new primitive was added.
